summary: Iteration 11 - Beverage Intelligence Engine Backend Testing. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). All new beverage module endpoints working correctly including inventory with 10 seeded spirits, pour tracking with inventory decrement, variance analysis, cocktail costing, cellar monitoring with 6 zones (1 alert), and comped drinks tracking. Regression tests for calendar, RBAC, procurement, compliance, and finance endpoints all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: beverage.py: Well-structured beverage intelligence engine with 10 seeded spirits covering Tequila, Scotch, Vodka, Gin, Red Wine, Champagne, Bourbon
beverage.py: Pour tracking correctly decrements inventory based on pour_size_oz and bottle_oz (25.4oz for 750ml)
beverage.py: Variance analysis calculates theoretical vs actual pours with status levels (normal <5%, warning <15%, critical >=15%)
beverage.py: Cocktail costing correctly calculates ingredient costs from oz amounts using cost_per_oz formula
beverage.py: Cellar monitoring has 6 zones with proper temperature ranges - Walk-In Cooler B correctly flagged as alert (48.2F vs 36-41F optimal)
beverage.py: Comped drinks tracking properly sets revenue=0 while maintaining cost for management review
beverage.py: MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses using {'_id': 0} projection
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for bartender, comp_reason (TEST_vip_guest), and cocktail recipe (TEST_Margarita)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested all beverage intelligence endpoints. 10 seeded spirits: Clase Azul Reposado, Macallan 18, Grey Goose, Ketel One, Hendrick's Gin, Opus One 2018, Veuve Clicquot, Don Julio 1942, Maker's Mark, Patron Silver. Pour tracking decrements inventory (1 pour = pour_size_oz/25.4 bottles). Cellar has 6 zones with Walk-In Cooler B in alert status. Cocktail costing calculates from ingredient oz amounts. All regression endpoints (calendar, rbac, procurement, compliance, finance) still working.

backend_tests.inventory_list: PASS - Returns 10+ spirits with total_value, total_bottles, low_stock_count, avg_pour_cost
backend_tests.inventory_filter_tequila: PASS - spirit_type=Tequila returns only tequila items
backend_tests.inventory_single_item: PASS - /api/beverage/inventory/spr-1 returns item with pour_history array
backend_tests.pour_log: PASS - POST /api/beverage/pour logs pour and decrements inventory
backend_tests.pour_comped: PASS - is_comp=true logs comped drink with revenue=0
backend_tests.pours_list: PASS - Returns pour history with total_revenue, total_cost, pour_cost_pct, comp_count
backend_tests.pour_invalid_item: PASS - Pour with invalid item_id returns 404
backend_tests.variance_analysis: PASS - Returns variance for all items with theoretical_pours, actual_pours, variance_pct, variance_status
backend_tests.cellar_status: PASS - Returns 6 zones with 1 alert (Walk-In Cooler B)
backend_tests.comps_summary: PASS - Returns total_comps, total_cost, by_reason breakdown
backend_tests.cocktail_create: PASS - Creates recipe with calculated total_cost, pour_cost_pct, margin
